title: Insurance Appraisers, Auto Damage
description: Appraise automobile or other vehicle damage to determine repair costs for insurance claim settlement. Prepare insurance forms to indicate repair cost or cost estimates and recommendations. May seek agreement with automotive repair shop on repair costs.

tasks.text: Evaluate practicality of repair as opposed to payment of market value of vehicle before accident.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review repair cost estimates with automobile repair shop to secure agreement on cost of repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Examine damaged vehicle to determine extent of structural, body, mechanical, electrical, or interior damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare insurance forms to indicate repair cost estimates and recommendations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate parts and labor to repair damage, using standard automotive labor and parts cost manuals and knowledge of automotive repair.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine salvage value on total-loss vehicle.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange to have damage appraised by another appraiser to resolve disagreement with shop on repair cost.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
